sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
✨ Pyrite Laxmi Charan Diwali Combo

Invoke abundance, purity, and divine blessings this festive season with the Pyrite Laxmi Charan Diwali Combo. A sacred blend of wealth-attracting Pyrite, purifying Selenite, and auspicious Laxmi Charan, this combo is designed to energize your home with positivity and prosperity.

The set includes:

• 
🪔 One Crystal Candle – radiates soothing light and amplifies crystal energy.

• 
👣 Laxmi Charan (with pyrite & selenite) – a symbol of Goddess Laxmi’s divine presence, bringing wealth and fortune.

• 
✨ Pyrite – the crystal of prosperity and protection, shielding from negativity while attracting abundance.

Perfect for Diwali rituals, pooja rooms, or gifting, this combo creates a sacred aura that welcomes luck, happiness, and prosperity into your space.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
- Attracts wealth, growth, and good fortune.

- Enhances positivity, clarity, and spiritual protection.

- Creates a sacred and auspicious energy during Diwali rituals.

- Thoughtful gift of prosperity for loved ones.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Place the Laxmi Charan at the entrance or your temple space to welcome prosperity and divine blessings.

Light the Crystal Candle during your Diwali pooja or daily rituals to invite positive vibrations and illumination.

Sprinkle the Saffron & keep Selenite nearby for cleansing energy, purity, and protection of your home environment.
